title: RG Consultancy Website
shortDescription: Corporate website for Reddington Global Consultancy with modern UI, service showcases, and lead capture.
description: Built a full-featured corporate website for Reddington Global Consultancy. The platform includes a dynamic service showcase, team profiles, client testimonials, and an integrated lead capture form connected to a CRM backend. Deployed on Hostinger VPS with Nginx reverse proxy and PM2 process management.
metrics: Reduced page load time by 40% using Next.js SSG
Increased lead capture by 25% after form optimization
highlights: Next.js App Router with SSG/SSR for optimal SEO
Custom CMS-like admin panel for content management
REST API with input validation and rate limiting

title: RG Care (NGO Platform)
shortDescription: NGO web platform for Reddington Care with donation workflows, volunteer registration, and impact tracking.
description: Developed the RG Care NGO platform to support charitable initiatives. Features include donation workflows, volunteer registration, campaign management, and impact metric dashboards. The platform integrates payment gateways and sends automated email confirmations for donations.
metrics: Processed 100+ donation transactions in launch month
Email automation reduced manual follow-up by 80%
highlights: Secure donation workflow with transaction logging

title: RG US Debt Website
shortDescription: Targeted US audience debt relief service website with SEO optimization and multi-region lead capture.
description: Built a high-performance website for RG's US debt relief services targeting international audiences. Focused on SEO optimization, fast loading, and conversion-optimized landing pages. Includes multi-step lead capture forms, legal disclaimer management, and integrated analytics.
metrics: Multi-step form increased conversion rate by 35%
Deployed on AWS EC2 with CloudFront CDN
highlights: Optimized for Google Core Web Vitals
Multi-step lead capture with form validation
Dynamic meta tags for international SEO

title: Lead Management System (LMS)
shortDescription: Internal CRM with role-based access control, pipeline management, and automated lead assignment.
description: Designed and developed an internal Lead Management System (LMS) for Reddington Global Consultancy. The system features role-based access control (admin, manager, agent), lead pipeline visualization, automated assignment rules, activity logging, and reporting dashboards. Built with a RESTful API backend and a React frontend.
highlights: Activity logs and performance reporting dashboard
